en-US.name: OpenFrame Kiosk
en-US.summary: Digital art frame and smart display kiosk for Echo Show
en-US.description: Turn your Echo Show into a digital art frame, smart calendar, and kiosk display. Connect to your OpenFrame server to display photos, calendars, dashboards, and more.

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Requires an Echo Show device with screen. Say 'Alexa, open OpenFrame' to launch.
